title: Fug
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fug''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. They were used, along with other fungi such as [[Snoruuk/Legends|Snoruuk]], as a food staple of the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime|reprint=1}}
